summary: SARS-CoV-2 causes anosmia mainly by damaging the olfactory epithelium and supporting cells through ACE2 receptor interaction, not by disrupting neuronal nuclear architecture. Current evidence does not support any role for altered nuclear structure or chromatin organization in this condition.
